title: Incorrect result with complex OR-connected WHERE and STAT4
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(a Int32, b String DEFAULT 'default');
INSERT INTO t1(a, b) VALUES(1, 'value1'), (2, NULL), (3, 'value3');
CREATE TABLE t2(aa Int32, bb Float64);
INSERT INTO t2(aa, bb) VALUES(1, 1.5), (2, NULL), (3, -1.0);
CREATE VIEW err AS SELECT (SELECT COUNT() FROM t2 WHERE (t1.b IS NOT NULL AND t2.bb IS NULL) OR (t2.bb < toFloat64(t1.b)) OR (t1.b = t2.bb AND t2.aa > t1.a)) FROM t1;
key_bug_features: Different results with and without t1b index
